Email and calendar
made better
Fast, private email hosting for you or your business.
Try free for 30 days
For business
No obligation, no credit card required.
Mail
Contacts
Calendar
Why Fastmail?
“I have used Fastmail for years and never had one problem. Not one.”
“I migrated from Google Workspace to Fastmail and would never go back.”
“I've been using Fastmail for more than ten years. I couldn't be happier.”
Better
for staying on top of it all
See how much better email and calendars can be when it’s super fast, has great search, and surfaces the information you need, right when you need it.
Boost your productivity
Pin
important messages to the top of your inbox for instant access.
Find any message in seconds with our powerful
search
.
Snooze
tickets and bills to just when you need them.
Stay productive
offline
— read, draft, search, and manage mail, calendar, and contacts.
Protect your privacy
Keep your real email address private with
Masked Email
.
Use
aliases
to keep your side hustles separate.
Stop spy pixels
tracking your location.
Get organized
Stay on schedule with our
fast, beautiful calendar
.
Know exactly what’s changed
when someone updates an event.
See all your events in one place by adding your
Google or iCloud calendars
.
Stay focused
Elegant
native apps
for every platform.
Avoid unwanted interruptions with
VIP-only notifications
.
Work on your time with
scheduled send
.
Add
private memos
to messages such as reminders, payment dates, or notes.
Better
isn’t easy to describe, but you know it when you see it
Best alternative to Gmail and iCloud for email, calendars, and contacts!
Jon Henshaw
Founder of Coywolf
I have used Fastmail for years and found them consistently excellent.
Dylan Beattie
Creator of the Rockstar programming language
Fastmail rocks! It’s secure, private, independent, and has a Gmail transfer tool. You won’t regret the move.
Vicky Brasseur
Open source expert and author
Better
for your peace of mind
Private
Free email isn’t really free: you’re paying with your privacy. As a paid service, we only serve you, our customer. This means we have no split loyalties, no mining of your personal data, no sharing it with third parties, and no ads, ever.
See plans
Secure
Your email unlocks access to everything you do on the web. It’s the history of where you’ve been, what you buy, and who you know. We take great measures to keep it secure, backed up, and always available to you — and no one else.
Learn about email security
Personal support
From “how do I get started” to “I’ve lost my phone” panic, when you need that extra helping hand, we’re here for you. Our support team are online 24/7, providing personal support to ensure your email runs smoothly.
Get support
No lock-in
We’ve been delivering a better service for over 20 years, growing all that time — because once you’ve tried it, you won’t settle for anything else. People stay because we’re the best, not because it’s too hard to get your data out. After all, it’s your data, not ours.
Read our values
Better
for everyone
We won’t let email become just another closed messaging service owned by big tech.
We don’t just make a better email service. We also make email better for everyone with our work advancing open standards and leading industry co-operation. We employ the top experts on email and calendaring, working on everything from email authentication to calendar interoperability.
Our contributions include the development of JMAP, the next-generation open sync protocol, and a wide range of open-source code used by organizations around the world. Our work keeps the internet open, and stops email becoming just another walled garden.
Read about open source and standards

hits.title: Moving 12 years of email from GMail to FastMail
FastMail loses customers, faces calls to move over anti-encryption laws
Fastmail accounts blocked in Russia, here's what we know
FastMail’s servers are in the US – what this means for you
Fastmail, Runbox, and Posteo under DDoS extortion attack

analysis.name: Fastmail
analysis.value_proposition: Fast, private email hosting for individuals and businesses that doesn't mine your data or show ads, with integrated calendar, contacts, and a full suite of productivity features.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious individuals, families, and small businesses switching away from Gmail or Google Workspace who want a paid, ad-free email service with their own domain and no big-tech lock-in

features.name: masked email
features.description: Generates unique disposable email addresses to hide your real address and secure logins
features.evidence_quote: Masked Email to hide address and secure logins

features.name: email aliases
features.description: Multiple email addresses under one account to separate personal, work, and side projects
features.evidence_quote: Use aliases to keep your side hustles separate.

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Host email on your own domain for custom addresses like you@yourdomain.com
features.evidence_quote: Use your own domains to make custom addresses

features.name: offline support
features.description: Read, draft, search, and manage mail, calendar, and contacts without an internet connection
features.evidence_quote: Offline support. Read, draft, search, and manage calendars and contacts.

features.name: scheduled send
features.description: Compose emails and schedule them to send at a future date and time
features.evidence_quote: Scheduled Send and Snooze for better focus

features.name: snooze
features.description: Snooze emails to resurface them exactly when needed (bills, tickets, follow-ups)
features.evidence_quote: Snooze tickets and bills to just when you need them.

features.name: message pinning
features.description: Pin important messages to the top of the inbox for instant access
features.evidence_quote: Pin important messages to the top of your inbox for instant access.

features.name: search
features.description: Fast, powerful full-text search across all mail
features.evidence_quote: Find any message in seconds with our powerful search.

features.name: calendar
features.description: Integrated calendar with personal and work calendars and event change notifications
features.evidence_quote: Stay on schedule with our fast, beautiful calendar.

features.name: event change notifications
features.description: Notifies you exactly what changed when someone updates a shared calendar event
features.evidence_quote: Know exactly what's changed when someone updates an event.

features.name: contacts
features.description: Integrated contacts management with import and auto-build from email history
features.evidence_quote: Import or automatically build your contact list

features.name: private memos
features.description: Add private notes, reminders, or payment details to any message visible only to you
features.evidence_quote: Add a private message, reminders, or payment details to your messages.

features.name: spy pixel blocking
features.description: Automatically blocks tracking pixels in emails to prevent sender location tracking
features.evidence_quote: Stop spy pixels tracking your location.

features.name: vip notifications
features.description: Filter push notifications to only alert on messages from designated VIP contacts
features.evidence_quote: Avoid unwanted interruptions with VIP-only notifications.

features.name: native apps
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps plus a web interface supporting all platforms
features.evidence_quote: Elegant native apps for every platform.

features.name: google calendar integration
features.description: Add and view Google calendars alongside Fastmail calendars in one unified view

features.evidence_quote: Stop spam

features.evidence_quote: Custom email addresses like you@yourbusiness.com. Mix and match plans and save money.

features.name: 24/7 human support
features.description: Round-the-clock expert support from real people, not bots
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 expert support from real people

features.name: no ads policy
features.description: Paid service with no advertising, no data mining, and no sharing with third parties
features.evidence_quote: no mining of your personal data, no sharing it with third parties, and no ads, ever.

features.name: data portability
features.description: Full access to export your data with no lock-in by design
features.evidence_quote: People stay because we're the best, not because it's too hard to get your data out.

features.name: multi-billing-cycle pricing
features.description: Choose monthly, 12-month, 24-month, or 36-month billing cycles with increasing discounts
features.evidence_quote: Pay yearly and save $12

features.name: 30-day free trial
features.description: Try any paid plan free for up to 30 days with no credit card required
features.evidence_quote: Try free for 30 days. No obligation, no credit card required.

differentiators: Privacy-first paid service with no ads, no data mining, and no third-party data sharing
Created and actively maintains JMAP, the next-generation open email sync protocol
Masked Email for protecting real email address with unique disposable forwarding addresses
20+ years of independent operation with no big-tech ownership and full data portability
Employs top experts in email and calendaring standards; contributes to open-source and open standards
Spy pixel blocking to prevent senders from tracking your location via email
Mix-and-match business plans to optimize cost per user type

praised: Rock-solid reliability: 'I have used Fastmail for years and never had one problem. Not one.'
Strong migration experience vs Google Workspace: 'I migrated from Google Workspace to Fastmail and would never go back.'
Long-term satisfaction and loyalty: 'I've been using Fastmail for more than ten years. I couldn't be happier.'
1Password + Masked Email integration widely praised by HN community (566↑ thread on integrating with Fastmail)
JMAP API quality and developer experience praised (HN: 'Integrating with Fastmail', 566↑)
complaints: Australian Assistance and Access Act (anti-encryption laws) raised serious trust concerns among privacy users (HN: 378↑)
Servers located in the US is a concern for non-US users seeking privacy from US jurisdiction (HN: 291↑)
Russian government blocked accounts with limited recourse for affected users (HN: 297↑)
Repeated DDoS extortion attacks raised availability concerns (HN threads: 291↑ and 267↑)

tiers.name: Individual
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user, 60 GB storage (50 mail + 10 files), custom domains, masked email, offline support, 30-day trial

tiers.name: Duo
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 users, 120 GB total storage (60 GB each), shared calendars and address book, 30-day trial

pricing.notes: No free tier; 30-day trial with no credit card required. Four billing cycles: monthly, 12-month, 24-month, 36-month — longer terms yield deeper discounts. Individual: $6/mo → $5/mo (yr) → $4.75/mo (2yr) → $4.67/mo (3yr). Duo: $10/mo → $8/mo (yr) → $7.60/mo (2yr) → $7.47/mo (3yr). Business plans exist (separate tab on pricing page) with admin controls and mix-and-match seats; specific business tier pricing not captured in source. Storage add-ons available for purchase. Pricing is region-variable (50+ country selector shown on pricing page).
